name: InvestorClaw
description: Portfolio analysis skill for OpenClaw agents. Provides holdings snapshots, performance metrics, bond analytics (YTM, duration, FRED-backed benchmarks), analyst consensus ratings, news correlation, and CSV/Excel reports. Compact token-aware stdout keeps sessions within 128K+ context windows. Optional local LLM consultation (Ollama) adds synthesis and key-insight enrichment. Built-in financial advice guardrails enforce educational-only output.

FINNHUB_KEY.label: Finnhub API Key
FINNHUB_KEY.description: Real-time quotes and analyst ratings. Free key at https://finnhub.io/register

NEWSAPI_KEY.label: NewsAPI Key
NEWSAPI_KEY.description: News correlation for portfolio holdings. Free key at https://newsapi.org/register

MASSIVE_API_KEY.label: Massive API Key
MASSIVE_API_KEY.description: Market data via Massive (polygon.io-compatible). Sign up at https://polygon.io/dashboard/signup

ALPHA_VANTAGE_KEY.label: Alpha Vantage API Key
ALPHA_VANTAGE_KEY.description: Supplemental price data. Free key at https://www.alphavantage.co/support/#api-key

FRED_API_KEY.label: FRED API Key
FRED_API_KEY.description: Treasury & TIPS benchmark yields (St. Louis Fed). Free key at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/docs/api/api_key.html

INVESTOR_CLAW_REPORTS_DIR.label: Reports Output Directory
INVESTOR_CLAW_REPORTS_DIR.description: Where analysis JSON, CSV, and Excel reports are saved. Defaults to ~/portfolio_reports/

INVESTOR_CLAW_PORTFOLIO_DIR.label: Portfolio Files Directory
INVESTOR_CLAW_PORTFOLIO_DIR.description: Directory containing your portfolio CSV/Excel files. Defaults to the skill's portfolios/ subdirectory.

INVESTORCLAW_CONSULTATION_ENABLED.label: Enable Local LLM Consultation
INVESTORCLAW_CONSULTATION_ENABLED.description: Offload heavy portfolio synthesis to a local Ollama model. When disabled, InvestorClaw uses keyword heuristics (still fully functional, less nuanced).

INVESTORCLAW_CONSULTATION_ENDPOINT.label: Ollama Endpoint
INVESTORCLAW_CONSULTATION_ENDPOINT.description: URL of your Ollama server. Defaults to http://localhost:11434. Can be a local or remote host.

INVESTORCLAW_CONSULTATION_MODEL.label: Consultation Model
INVESTORCLAW_CONSULTATION_MODEL.description: Ollama model for portfolio synthesis. Default: gemma4-consult (tuned gemma4:e4b derivative, ~65 tok/s, requires 12+ GB VRAM, CUDA 8.0+). Also tested: gemma4:e4b, nemotron-3-nano, qwen2.5:14b. Run /portfolio setup to auto-detect available models.

INVESTORCLAW_CONSULTATION_HMAC_KEY.label: Consultation HMAC Key
INVESTORCLAW_CONSULTATION_HMAC_KEY.description: HMAC-SHA256 signing key for synthesis fingerprints. Auto-generated on first run if not set. Used to verify that consultation output has not been fabricated or modified.

INVESTORCLAW_CARD_FORMAT.label: Consultation Card Format
INVESTORCLAW_CARD_FORMAT.description: Artifact format for local consultation output: json, svg, or both. Use json for mobile/text-only channels.

INVESTORCLAW_STONKMODE_PROVIDER.label: Stonkmode Provider
INVESTORCLAW_STONKMODE_PROVIDER.description: Narration provider for stonkmode: ollama or openai_compat.

INVESTORCLAW_STONKMODE_ENDPOINT.label: Stonkmode Cloud Endpoint
INVESTORCLAW_STONKMODE_ENDPOINT.description: OpenAI-compatible chat/completions base URL for stonkmode when provider is openai_compat.

INVESTORCLAW_STONKMODE_API_KEY.label: Stonkmode Cloud API Key
INVESTORCLAW_STONKMODE_API_KEY.description: Bearer token for the OpenAI-compatible stonkmode provider.

INVESTORCLAW_STONKMODE_MODEL.label: Stonkmode Model
INVESTORCLAW_STONKMODE_MODEL.description: Model used for stonkmode narration. Defaults to gemma4:e4b for Ollama or grok-3-fast for openai_compat.
